---
title: "Take-Home Exercise Index"
author: "Yee Weicong Mark"
date: "April 25, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

## [Take-Home Exercises Index]{style="color:  #4682B4; font-size: 38px;"}

![](images/clipboard-2901820319.png)
